task_objective: Land the vehicle safely on the target zone by approaching the center, descending gently, staying upright, using minimal control effort, and making stable ground contact without bouncing or crashing.

component_blueprint.description: Reward for horizontal proximity to target center
Reward for low altitude above ground
Reward for near‑optimal descent velocity around -0.5 m/s
Penalize body tilt and angular velocity to keep upright
Penalty for using main and side engines

anti_exploit_principles: All dense rewards are clipped to prevent unbounded exploitation.
Descent velocity reward follows a smooth Gaussian shape to avoid oscillation incentives.
Terminal bonus requires both legs to contact, preventing early termination cheating.
Control cost is signed negative to discourage unnecessary actuation.
